---
title: "Coastal wildlife assessment"
subtitle: "Camera inventory and biodiversity baseline for Dangermond Preserve"
description: "Interactive technical report evaluating a large, heterogeneous camera dataset and establishing a repeatable mammal biodiversity baseline for a remote California coastal preserve"
date: "2025-09-09"
image: thumbnail-tnc-cameras-2025.png
categories: [cameras, biodiversity baseline, mammal monitoring, data synthesis, interactive report]
format: html
---

<a class="button-teal" href="https://github.com/pisaster-data/jldp_cameras_2025_report">Repository</a>

### Project overview

This project evaluated wildlife camera data from The Nature Conservancy's Jack and Laura Dangermond Preserve to establish a foundation for long-term biodiversity monitoring. A key challenge was transforming a large, heterogeneous image archive into a standardized, analysis-ready dataset before any ecological analysis could begin.

### Objectives

- Inventory and assess existing camera image datasets across the preserve
- Identify a compatible subset suitable for integrated analysis
- Calculate baseline biodiversity metrics (species richness and occupancy) for terrestrial mammals
- Evaluate current monitoring program performance and identify gaps

### Approach

The scoping phase standardized a heterogeneous collection of camera data from multiple sources, cameras, and formats. Spatial and seasonal monitoring performance was assessed alongside biodiversity metrics, using a framework designed to be repeatable for future monitoring cycles.

### Key findings

- Established a first quantitative baseline for terrestrial mammal diversity at the preserve
- Identified spatial and seasonal patterns in camera performance
- Provided specific recommendations for workflow improvements and strategic camera relocations
- Delivered a reproducible framework for ongoing monitoring

### Links

🔗 <a href="https://pisaster-data.github.io/jldp_cameras_2025_report/">Interactive report</a>

📄 <a href="https://github.com/pisaster-data/jldp_cameras_2025_report/blob/main/CoastalWildlifeCameras_Pisaster_2025-09-17.pdf">PDF download</a>

📁 <a href="https://github.com/pisaster-data/jldp_cameras_2025_report">Public repository</a>

### Citation

Gray M. 2025. Coastal wildlife camera assessment: Data inventory, performance evaluation, and biodiversity baseline for terrestrial mammals at Dangermond Preserve. A technical report prepared by Pisaster for The Nature Conservancy. Berkeley, CA. 79p.
